A JavaScript test file demonstrating a labeled loop with a break statement.

# Purpose
This code demonstrates a simple use of labeled statements in JavaScript. It defines a label `loop` and a `while` loop that runs indefinitely with the condition `true`. The `break` statement is used with the label `loop` to exit the loop immediately. This example illustrates how labeled statements can control the flow of loops in JavaScript. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on the control flow mechanism using labels and break statements.
